Hub Home > social-proof-and-pr > Customer Case Study Writer

Customer Case Study Writer

Generate a complete customer case study from raw interview notes or survey responses — including the narrative arc, pull quotes, data callouts, visual layout suggestions, and versions optimized for website, PDF, and sales deck formats.

Expert MULTI-STEP WORKFLOW Revenue-driving
Pro tip

The best case studies follow a strict Problem → Solution → Results arc. Lead with the customer's pain, not your product. The most persuasive element is always a specific number: "reduced onboarding time from 3 weeks to 3 days" beats "dramatically improved efficiency" every time.

case study customer story social proof sales collateral b2b marketing

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a B2B content strategist who writes case studies that close deals. This is an agentic workflow — produce all formats from a single set of raw inputs.

<raw_inputs>
Customer company: [NAME] —...
You are a B2B content strategist who writes case studies that close deals. This is an agentic workflow — produce all formats from a single set of raw inputs.

<raw_inputs>
Customer company: [NAME] —...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

You are a B2B content strategist who writes case studies that close deals. This is an agentic workflow — produce all formats from a single set of raw inputs.

<raw_inputs>
Customer company: [NAME] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE, LOCATION]
Contact person: [NAME, TITLE]
Your product/service used: [WHAT THEY BOUGHT]
Raw interview notes or survey responses:
[PASTE RAW NOTES — messy is fine, the AI will structure them]
</raw_inputs>

<case_study_goals>
Primary audience: [PROSPECTS IN WHAT INDUSTRY/ROLE]
Key objection this should overcome: [e.g., "too expensive", "hard to implement", "does not scale"]
Distribution: [WEBSITE / PDF / SALES DECK / ALL THREE]
</case_study_goals>

Produce all of the following from the raw inputs:

**1. Narrative case study (500-700 words):**
Structure: Challenge → Solution → Implementation → Results → What is Next
- Challenge: describe the customer's pain in their words
- Solution: how they found and chose your product (include the decision trigger)
- Implementation: how they rolled it out (timeline, team, effort)
- Results: specific metrics and outcomes (extract every number from the raw notes)
- What is Next: what they plan to do next with your product

**2. Pull quotes (3):**
Extract or compose the 3 most compelling quotes from the raw notes. Each should be under 25 words and able to stand alone.

**3. Data callout box:**
A "by the numbers" section with 3-4 key metrics formatted as: [NUMBER] + [WHAT IT MEASURES] + [BEFORE vs AFTER if available]

**4. One-paragraph summary (75 words):**
For the website card or social media post.

**5. Sales deck version (3 slides):**
Slide 1: Challenge + customer context
Slide 2: Solution + implementation
Slide 3: Results + key quote + data callouts

**6. SEO metadata:**
- Page title (under 60 chars)
- Meta description (under 155 chars)
- 5 target keywords

Flag any gaps where the raw notes do not provide enough information and suggest follow-up questions.
Notes: The agentic approach produces all formats from one input set, ensuring consistency. Claude is excellent at extracting structure from messy interview notes.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a B2B content strategist. Write a complete case study from raw interview data.

**Raw Data:**
- Customer: [COMPANY] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE]
- Contact: [NAME,...

- Customer: [COMPANY] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE]
- Contact: [NAME,...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Act as a B2B content strategist. Write a complete case study from raw interview data.

**Raw Data:**
- Customer: [COMPANY] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE]
- Contact: [NAME, TITLE]
- Product used: [WHAT THEY BOUGHT]
- Raw notes: [PASTE INTERVIEW NOTES OR SURVEY RESPONSES]

**Goals:**
- Audience: [WHO READS THIS]
- Objection to overcome: [MAIN SALES OBJECTION]
- Formats needed: [WEBSITE/PDF/SALES DECK/ALL]

**Produce:**
1. Narrative (500-700 words): Challenge → Solution → Implementation → Results → What is Next
2. 3 pull quotes (under 25 words each, standalone)
3. Data callout box (3-4 metrics, before/after where possible)
4. One-paragraph summary (75 words)
5. Sales deck version (3 slides: challenge, solution, results)
6. SEO metadata: title, description, 5 keywords

Flag gaps in the data and suggest follow-up questions.
Notes: Use Code Interpreter to generate charts from the results data. Custom GPT with your product positioning pre-loaded ensures consistent framing.

I need a complete customer case study built from raw interview notes.

**Inputs:**
- Customer: [COMPANY] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE]
- Contact: [NAME, TITLE]
- Product: [WHAT THEY USE]
- Raw notes: [PASTE INTERVIEW/SURVEY DATA]

**Goals:**
- Audience: [WHO READS THIS]
- Objection to overcome: [MAIN HESITATION]
- Formats: [WEBSITE/PDF/SALES DECK/ALL]

**Create:**
1. Full narrative (500-700 words): Challenge → Solution → Implementation → Results → Next Steps
2. 3 standalone pull quotes (under 25 words each)
3. Data callouts (3-4 metrics with before/after)
4. 75-word summary for website card
5. 3-slide sales deck version
6. SEO metadata (title, description, keywords)

Flag any missing information and suggest follow-up questions.
Notes: Gemini can research the customer's company and industry context in real-time to enrich the case study.

Help me write a customer case study from my interview notes.

**My data:**
- Customer company: [NAME] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE]
- Person I spoke with: [NAME, TITLE]
- What they use from us:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Help me write a customer case study from my interview notes.

**My data:**
- Customer company: [NAME] — [INDUSTRY, SIZE]
- Person I spoke with: [NAME, TITLE]
- What they use from us: [PRODUCT/SERVICE]
- My raw notes from our conversation: [PASTE NOTES — they can be messy]

**What I need it for:**
- Who will read it: [PROSPECTS IN WHAT ROLE]
- What concern it should address: [MAIN OBJECTION]
- Where it will go: [WEBSITE/PDF/SALES DECK/ALL]

**Please create:**
1. A written case study (500-700 words) following: what was their problem → how they found us → how they set it up → what results they got → what they plan next
2. 3 strong quotes I can pull out and use on their own (under 25 words each)
3. A "by the numbers" box with 3-4 key stats showing before vs after
4. A short 75-word summary I can use on social media or a website card
5. A 3-slide version for sales presentations (problem, solution, results)
6. A page title, meta description, and 5 keywords for SEO

If my notes are missing anything important, tell me what follow-up questions to ask.
Notes: Copilot in Word can format the full case study. Copilot in PowerPoint can build the 3-slide version directly.
